title: GardenersDream 3 x Festuca Glauca Intense Blue Plant - Outdoor Garden Ready Plant - Colourful Decorative Grass - Evergreen Ornamental Grass for Gardens (20-30cm incl. 9cm Pot)
features: EVERGREEN ORNAMENTAL GRASS: This ornamental grass plant maintains its attractive appearance year-round, providing continuous visual interest to your garden even in winter. Its evergreen nature ensures your garden remains lively and colourful throughout all seasons.

STRIKING FOLIAGE: The bluish steel wire-like foliage of this blue grass plant adds a unique aesthetic to your garden. This striking foliage creates a beautiful contrast with other plants and transforms the overall beauty of your garden.

FLOWER SPIKES: In summer, this all-year-round outdoor plant produces bluish-green flower spikes adorned with silver plumes, adding an extra layer of beauty and texture to your garden. These flower spikes attract pollinators, contributing to a healthy and vibrant garden ecosystem.

GROWTH AND SPREAD: This decorative grass arrives at a height of 15-30 cm, including the 9 cm pot, making it perfect for immediate planting. With proper care, this compact, mound-forming garden grass can reach a height and spread of 0.2m to 0.3m. It is ideal for borders and small garden spaces, providing a neat and tidy appearance.

LOW MAINTENANCE: This outdoor garden plant is easy to grow and requires minimal care, making it ideal for beginner gardeners or those seeking a low-maintenance option. It thrives with minimal attention, reducing the need for frequent watering.
